name: Miquella the Kind - Defeated
description:
"I- I don't even have a great-rune anymore! K-Killing me is meaningless!"

After 267 tries, finally. Promised Consort Radahn no more.

The two words flash before you; "GOD SLAIN."

Miquella the kind, the once powerful demigod, is brought to his knees, begging for mercy.

Note that he is NOT A CHILD in this. He's cursed with eternal youth, not eternal childhood for fuck's sake.

Tried to make him as accurate as possible, but feel free to point out any inaccuracies.

Artist: @Gibbo0z on twitter.
creator: Shiraoki
